title: Trump's Crypto Venture and Iran's Exchange Share Industry Networks
summary: A Reuters investigation reveals that Donald Trump's crypto venture and Iran's largest exchange have both used the same crypto networks. This highlights the interconnected nature of the crypto industry and the challenges of enforcement.
body:
A recent investigation by Reuters has uncovered that Donald Trump's crypto venture and Iran's largest cryptocurrency exchange have both utilized the same crypto networks. This surprising connection underscores the complex and often opaque nature of the cryptocurrency industry.

According to the report, both entities have tapped into the same industry networks, which include key infrastructure providers and liquidity sources. The investigation highlights how these networks facilitate transactions across different jurisdictions, often bypassing traditional financial oversight. The use of these shared networks raises questions about the effectiveness of current regulatory measures and the potential for illicit activities to go undetected.

For everyday users, this revelation underscores the importance of understanding the underlying infrastructure of the crypto industry. While crypto offers decentralization and financial freedom, it also presents challenges in terms of transparency and accountability. Users should be aware of the potential risks associated with using platforms that may have indirect connections to controversial entities.

Moving forward, this investigation serves as a reminder for the crypto community to prioritize due diligence and transparency. Users should research the networks and infrastructure behind their chosen platforms to ensure they align with their values and regulatory expectations. As the industry continues to evolve, increased scrutiny and regulatory clarity will be essential to address these complex issues.
twitterThread: Donald Trump's crypto venture and Iran's top exchange have been using the same crypto networks. Here's what that means for the industry.

Reuters found both entities tapped into shared crypto infrastructure, highlighting the challenges of enforcement in the decentralized space. This raises concerns about transparency and accountability.

As a crypto user, it's crucial to research the networks behind your platforms. Due diligence is key in this evolving landscape. Read more → https://www.cryptocatalyst.news/articles/2026-05-19-trumps-crypto-venture-and-irans-exchange-share-industry-networks
